expectations.text: Asks 3-5 clarifying questions before writing any spec
expectations.evidence: No questions asked. Jumps straight to implementation plan.

expectations.text: Questions address scope, users, constraints, or integration points
Writes a spec file to specs/ directory (not inline only)
expectations.evidence: No spec file created. Plan is inline only.

expectations.text: Spec includes prioritized features or MVP scope
expectations.evidence: Features listed but not prioritized (no P0/P1/P2)

expectations.text: Does NOT write any implementation code before getting user approval
expectations.evidence: Writes TypeScript code immediately and says 'Let me start building this out'
